sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42658" key="e(rpeto/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑρπετό-εις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n42658.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of reptiles,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γένος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:274" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.274</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
